shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -print | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -400
find pages -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'
find components styles -maxdepth 2 -type f -print | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c 'echo "--- {}"; sed -n "1,220p" "{}"'
cat package.json && echo '--- tsconfig' && cat tsconfig.json && echo '--- next.config' && cat next.config.ts

sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/02-guides/migrating/app-router-migration.mdx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/15-route-handlers.mdx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/error.mdx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/03-api-reference/03-file-conventions/not-found.mdx
rm -rf pages components/AppProvider.js && npm run build
find app components styles -maxdepth 4 -type f | sort
